mapper.select: SELECT ep.eval_year AS year, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.grade = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.grade = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.grade = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.grade = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cTierCount FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.eval_year = #{year} AND qe.evaluation_level = 3 GROUP BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence ORDER BY ep.eval_year, ep.eval_sequence

SELECT ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS deptAvgScore, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status != 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS evaluationRate, SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status = 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unevaluatedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bTierCount, SUM(CASE WHEN e.employee_tier = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cTierCount FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN employee dl ON dl.employee_id = #{dlId} JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND e.department_id = dl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER'

SELECT tl_emp.employee_id AS tlId, tl_emp.employee_name AS tlName, COUNT(DISTINCT qe.evaluatee_id) AS memberCount, ROUND(AVG(qe.score), 1) AS teamAvgScore, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN qe.status = 'NO_INPUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '심사중' END AS evaluationStatus FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN employee dl ON dl.employee_id = #{dlId} JOIN employee tl_emp ON tl_emp.department_id = e.department_id AND tl_emp.employee_role = 'TL' JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND e.department_id = dl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' GROUP BY tl_emp.employee_id, tl_emp.employee_name ORDER BY teamAvgScore DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN employee dl ON dl.employee_id = #{dlId} JOIN evaluation_period ep ON qe.evaluation_period_id = ep.eval_period_id WHERE ep.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND qe.evaluation_level = 2 AND e.department_id = dl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER'
